completed_tasks.name: Root cause diagnosis — Maximum update depth exceeded
completed_tasks.notes: Cause: ConditionCombobox (HEAD) used Dialog+Tabs (nested Radix Presence). applyCondition → Zustand useSyncExternalStore sync re-render → unstable composeRefs → setNode loop

completed_tasks.name: Add modal={false} to all other CombatPage dialogs
Replace ScrollArea with plain div (cosmetic cleanup)

remaining_tasks.name: Verify fix in browser — run dev server and test condition apply on CombatPage

human_actions_pending.action: Run dev server and verify the fix: open CombatPage, add a combatant, open ConditionCombobox, apply a condition — no crash should occur
human_actions_pending.context: Fix committed as 754184d6 but not yet tested in browser

decisions.decision: createPortal + flushSync for ConditionCombobox instead of modal={false}
decisions.rationale: modal={false} only prevents react-remove-scroll loop. The Presence/composeRefs loop requires zero Radix in the component tree. flushSync(close) unmounts portal before any Zustand mutation fires.

decisions.decision: modal={false} sufficient for other dialogs (DyingCascadeDialog, HpControls, etc.)
decisions.rationale: Plain Dialog without nested Tabs/Collapsible has only one Presence level — refs are stable. The loop only manifests with nested Presence (Dialog+TabsContent).

next_action: Run dev server, open CombatPage, apply conditions — verify no crash. If crash persists, check DyingCascadeDialog (subscribes to useConditionStore while open).
context_notes: Bug: React 19 + Zustand useSyncExternalStore + Radix Presence interaction. When Zustand forces a sync re-render while Radix Presence is mounted AND there is nested Presence (TabsContent inside Dialog), composeRefs becomes unstable → infinite setState loop. Fix: remove Radix from the innermost component (createPortal), not just modal={false}.
